name: Corn Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 2 tablespoons cornstarch with 2 tablespoons water to form a smooth paste.
2. Add the mixture to the #2 can of cream style corn (or use 2-3 ears of fresh corn if available).
3. In a separate bowl, beat the eggs and add 3 cups canned milk, 1 tablespoon sugar, and salt to taste.
4. Combine the egg mixture with the corn and cream mixture.
5. Pour the combined mixture into a greased casserole or flat pan.
6. Bake in a slow oven at 300 degrees Fahrenheit until the consistency is like that of custard (50-60 minutes), ensuring the knife inserted comes out clean when tested.
